page_metadata.biotools__summary: PepMapper is a web-based mapping tool developed for the purpose of epitope prediction using a collection of affinity selected peptides (mimotopes) derived from phage display experiments.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PepMapper is a web-based mapping tool developed for the purpose of epitope prediction using a collection of affinity selected peptides (mimotopes) derived from phage display experiments.
